query:
SELECT id, project_id, status FROM cpa_projects LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, cpa_project_id, consultant_id, design_fee_method, design_fee_amount, import_json IS NOT NULL as has_json FROM cpa_project_consultants LIMIT 10;
